km.Sharples, Lancashire, England: សារpឡិស, ឡាncaស៊ីរe, ប្រទេសអង់គ្លេស

zh.lifeSummary: Richard De Sharples是John De Sharples的兒子，於1335年出生在英國藍卡爾沙普萊斯。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1425年在他的家鄉享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard De Sharples是John De Sharples的儿子，于1335年出生在英国藍卡爾沙普萊斯。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1425年在他的家乡享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sharples
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Sharples (Lancashire). The etymology of the placename is uncertain; it may derive from Old English scearp ‘sharp, pointed, steep’ + lǣs ‘meadow’ or lēas, plural of lēah ‘wood, woodland, clearing’, or from scearpol ‘place characterized by a pointed feature, pointed hill’.

variants.name: Sharpley
meanings: habitational name from Sharplow in Tissington (Derbyshire), from Old English scearp ‘sharp, pointed’ + hlāw ‘hill, mound’.
variant of Sharples with loss of -s.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Richard De Sharples was born in 1335, in Sharples, Lancashire, England as the son of John De Sharples. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1425, in his hometown, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard De Sharples est né en 1335, à Sharples, Lancashire, Angleterre, fils de John De Sharples. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1425, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 90 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard De Sharples wurde 1335 in Sharples, Lancashire, England, als Sohn von John De Sharples geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1425 im Alter von 90 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard De Sharples è nato il nel 1335 nel Sharples, Lancashire, England come figlio di John De Sharples. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1425, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 90 anni.

ja.Sharples, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアシャルプレス
ja.lifeSummary: Richard De Sharplesは1335年にイギリスランカシュアイアシャルプレスでJohn De Sharplesの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1425年に故郷で90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Sharples(은)는 1335년 영국 랭카실르 샤르플레스에서 John De Sharples의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1425년 그의 고향에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Richard De Sharples nasceu em 1335, em Sharples, Lancashire, Inglaterra filho de John De Sharples. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1425, em sua cidade natal, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard De Sharples родился в 1335 г. в местности шарплесь, ланкашир, Англия. Его отца звали John De Sharples. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1425 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 90 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard De Sharples nació en 1335, en Sharples, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hijo de John De Sharples. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1425, en su pueblo, a la edad de 90 años.

th.Sharples, Lancashire, England: แชรปลส, ลันแคชิเร, เอิงแลนด์
